mapper.insert:
insert into weart_member(member_idx,member_id,member_pwd,member_name,member_nick,member_phone,member_address, social_token,social_naver, social_facebook, social_google ,social_kakao,member_grade,member_regCode, member_phone_auth, member_delyn, member_regdate, member_ip
values(#{member_idx}, #{member_id}, #{member_pwd}, #{member_name}, #{member_nick}, #{member_phone}, #{member_address}, #{social_token},#{social_naver},#{social_facebook},#{social_kakao},#{member_grade},#{member_regCode},#{member_phone_auth}, #{member_delyn}, #{member_regdate}, #{member_ip})
mapper.select: select count(*) as member_grade from member where member_id=#{member_id} and member_pw=#{member_pwd}
select member_id, member_name, member_pwd, member_phone from member where member_id=#{member_id}

SELECT * FROM weart_member LEFT JOIN weart_company ON weart_member.member_id = weart_company.company_id UNION ALL SELECT * FROM weart_member RIGHT JOIN weart_company ON weart_member.member_id = weart_company.company_id
